meta.notes:
DocuSeal version of contract pipeline. Replaces DocuSign.

Lane A: Webhook → DocuSeal submission → respond
Lane B: DocuSeal webhook (signed) → download PDF
Lane C: Poll pending submissions every 30min

Required n8n variables:
- DOCUSEAL_BASE_URL: https://docuseal.orbiters.co.kr
- DOCUSEAL_API_KEY: (from .env)
- DOCUSEAL_TEMPLATE_ID: 1
